name: Marcus Miller
abstract: William Henry Marcus Miller Jr. (born June 14, 1959) is an American musician, songwriter and record producer.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Herbie's World - Herbie Hancock and Friends
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: David Finck
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee expresses high admiration for Marcus Miller's playing ('fantastic electric bass player', 'one of my all-time favorites') and mentions seeing him perform on a jazz cruise, but does not state they have met, collaborated, or played together.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Finck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 29, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Josiah Gluck
about_quotes.evidence: the house band consisted of Omar Harkim, Marcus Miller, Phillipe Saisse, Hiram Bullock... and I did part of the first season based upon my work at GRP I was brought in.
about_quotes.doc_title: Josiah Gluck interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 13, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Marcus Miller, Carol [Dubach?] [INTERVIEWEE] Yes, Carol [Dubach?], my friend, tennis player.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Branford Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: I told him when I heard Marcus Miller playing with Miles’s band, Marcus is an incredible bass guitarist
about_quotes.doc_title: Branford Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
